mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A[Diagnose hypertension
BP >= 140/90 on 3 occasions] --> B[Start ACE inhibitor
Lisinopril 10mg] B --> C[Wait 4 weeks] C --> D{BP at goal
< 130/80?} D -->|Yes| E[Continue current therapy
Annual follow-up] D -->|No| F[Increase ACE inhibitor
to max dose 40mg] F --> G[Wait 4 weeks] G --> H{BP at goal?} H -->|Yes| E H -->|No| I[Add thiazide diuretic
HCTZ 25mg] I --> J[Wait 4 weeks] J --> K{BP at goal?} K -->|Yes| L[Continue dual therapy] K -->|No| M{Side effects present?} M -->|Yes| N[Switch to ARB
Losartan] M -->|No| O[Add calcium channel blocker
Amlodipine 5mg
Triple therapy] O --> P{BP at goal after
triple therapy?} P -->|Yes| Q[Continue triple therapy] P -->|No| R[Refer to hypertension specialist]
